title: I can show you a love potion without drug or herb: if you want to be l | Hecato of Rhodes
description:
Stop waiting to be chosen. Reach out, show up, give first. Who needs to hear from you today?

#stoicism #friendship #hecato #stoicwisdom #discipline #stoicphilosophy #dailystoic #selfimprovement #loyalty #mindset
quote: I can show you a love potion without drug or herb: if you want to be loved, love.
author: Hecato of Rhodes
